title: 激辛上等コールバトル！

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'm at the cafeteria to get some food, when...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Woo! That is spicy! Water! I need some water!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Ahaha! Stop! You are hilarious! I'm dead! Beyond dead! I'm a zombie!
choice_data_list: What are you two up to?
What are you two up to?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Can't you tell? We're trying out the new thing on
the menu.

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
This fiery hot flavor is wild! No choice but to ride
it out!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But my mouth is, like, literally on fire! I can't take it anymore. I give up...
Muahaha! Exactly as I predicted! I win!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Tch! I thought she'd put up a little more of a
fight...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh? What's this about a fight?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
A bet! A wager! A game of chance with
Nakayama! We bet on whether you'd be able to
finish that spicy treat you've got there!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You gave up, so I won! Here's a little token of my
gratitude. I call this dance "Thanks So Much For
Quitting, Jordan"! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Hey, excuse yooouu?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ngh... I take it back. I'm still in this! I'll eat every
last bite, just you watch!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
This time I'm for real! I'll ride out this heat wave
to the bitter end!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
For real?! It's so hot though! But you're hotter
right now! No cap, you are fire, queen!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text:
What's happening? Are Jordan and her friends
doing something funny again?

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Come on, let's say it together!
Hey, Jordan...

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Show us what you got!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text: ...Show us what ya got.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, you! Who asked you to butt in?!

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
Haha! A sudden reversal... How can I not get in on
this?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Gimme a break! Not so fast, everyone. I bet her
mouth can't take any more. It's not like she can
keep going just because you cheered for—

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Chomp... Munch... Gulp! Ack, that's hot!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You're actually doing it?! Easily influenced much?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Don't underestimate me! There's no cheer or
trend I can't get behind!

text_block_list.name: Students
text_block_list.text: Eat! Eat! Eat! ♪ Show us what you got! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Egged on by the crowd, Tosen Jordan wolfs down
mouthful after mouthful of the spicy snack. But
just as she's about to reach her last bite...

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: So... hot... Ugh! I can't feel my lips!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But... like... as if I'm gonna lose!
choice_data_list: Force it all down with some water!
Force it all down with some water!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: But... like... as if I'm gonna lose!
choice_data_list: Force it all down with some water!
Force it all down with some water!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Right... I got thiiis!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Woo! Housed it! I win! In your face!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
And by the way... Pfft! Like, what even was that
cheer you gave at the end? You were getting way
too into it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Eh, whatever. I guess it gave me the energy to
wolf it down!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text: Yass, Jordan! Let's get a victory selfie!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Sure! Get over here! You too! Hurry up!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
Ah! I need to get a shot of Golshi's gloomy face
too!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Wait... Where'd she go?

text_block_list.name: Nakayama Festa
text_block_list.text:
She went home. Said she was gonna watch some
"creamy rakshasa meal" video or something.

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! What the hell is that about? I'm the one whose mouth is on fire!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Urgh, what's her deal?!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Right... Gulp... Gulp... Pheeew!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Cough... Washed it all down!

text_block_list.name: Daitaku Helios
text_block_list.text:
Nice, Jordan! That was seriously lit! Everyone's
losing it!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Yaaay! I guess might makes right, huh?

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text:
But whatever! I won! Right, Golshi! It's my win,
right?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Curse you! Curse yooou! I've gotta hand it to you
though. That was pretty awesome!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I got a good shot of you sweating like crazy and
slopping down water!

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: Huh?! There's no way I look good! Delete that!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Also, I put a clam and a lobster on either side of
you. I did a bang-up job with the touch-ups, so
feel free to make it your new background! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tosen Jordan
text_block_list.text: As if I'd want that!
